mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly lifting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth, boosting consumer spending and driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative or flat when UNRATE drops below 5.0% in more than 60% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth combined with rising real estate permits signals synchronized supply-demand expansion, which compresses risk premiums and lifts equity prices over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the joint INDPRO-HOUST composite signal remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, rising CPIAUCSL readings force tighter monetary policy expectations, which compress equity valuations and drive negative forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of observations when CPIAUCSL rises > 0.3% MoM in a high inflation regime.

mechanism_narrative: Rising personal savings and credit availability directly fund corporate capex and consumer spending, generating positive equity returns over the next month regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns show no significant positive correlation with RSAFS growth over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth decelerates below its 6-month moving average, supply chain bottlenecks emerge, raising input costs and compressing corporate margins, which drives negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in > 60% of instances when INDPRO 3-month change falls below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strong payroll growth and rising housing starts indicate robust aggregate demand and business confidence, which reduces equity risk premiums and lifts prices over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-HOUST composite signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During a rapid rate-hiking cycle, rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs for highly leveraged firms, triggering margin compression and driving negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of observations when FEDFUNDS rises > 0.25% month-over-month during a tightening cycle.
